title: Launch the demo project from home
description: This verifies the demo entry path loads the canonical SDA project and shows the recommended team results view with coverage, gaps, and roles populated.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select the demo project entry point
Wait for the loading animation to finish
Verify the project results view is displayed
Verify coverage, gaps, and recommended roles are populated

title: Open a demo project from a valid deep link
description: This test verifies that a visitor can open a valid SDA demo deep link and land directly on the project results experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /?demo=SDA-00001
Verify the project results experience is displayed
Verify the team coverage summary is displayed

title: Load the demo project from home
description: This test verifies that a manager can launch the demo SDA project from home and reach the project results view with team coverage and gaps visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Launch the demo SDA project
Verify the project results view is displayed
Verify the coverage and gaps summary is displayed

title: Open a demo project directly from its deep link
description: This verifies a valid demo code in the URL loads the matching project results view directly.

steps.description: Navigate to /?demo=SDA-53024
Verify the project results view is displayed
Verify the matching demo project is loaded

title: Complete onboarding tour and keep it dismissed
description: This verifies a first-time visitor can step through the home onboarding tour, close it, and return later without it reopening automatically.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the onboarding tour backdrop to appear
Advance to the next guided step
Advance through the remaining guided steps
Close the onboarding tour
Refresh the page
Verify the onboarding tour remains closed
Verify the home entry screen is visible

title: Review the recommended team coverage and gaps
description: A manager can open a project result and immediately review the recommended team’s coverage, gaps, and role assignments.
category: Project Results and Team Recommendation Review

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the demo project result from the home experience
Verify the recommended team workspace is displayed
Verify coverage, gaps, and role assignment information is displayed

title: Block invalid candidate search until enough characters are entered
description: This test verifies that a visitor cannot submit a candidate search query before the minimum character threshold is met.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Enter a short candidate search query
Verify the search submission remains disabled
Verify the empty search state remains visible

title: Persist theme across dashboard refresh
description: This verifies a user can change the theme and keep that preference when returning to the dashboard experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Switch to the alternate theme
Refresh the page
Verify the selected theme is still applied
Verify the dashboard content remains visible

title: Filter projects, inspect a match, and request recommendations
description: This verifies the Project Composer supports filtering the project list, selecting a project, reviewing its details, and generating team recommendations.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the Project Composer
Type a search term that matches projects into the project filter
Select a project from the filtered list
Request team recommendations for the selected project
Verify the project results view is displayed
Verify coverage, gaps, and role assignments are displayed

title: Search for a candidate from the home page
description: An employee can search with a valid query from home and see ranked candidate results after submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the search input
Type a query with at least three characters into the search field
Submit the search
Verify ranked candidate results are displayed
Verify the loading state has completed

title: Persist the selected theme on the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a visitor can switch themes on the dashboard and keep the selected theme after refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Toggle the theme
Refresh the page
Verify the selected theme is still applied
Verify the dashboard content remains visible

title: Complete the onboarding tour once and keep it hidden
description: This test verifies that a first-time visitor can complete the onboarding tour and not see it again after returning to the home page in the same browser.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Complete the onboarding tour
Navigate away from home and return to home
Verify the onboarding tour is hidden
Verify the home experience is displayed

title: Open a candidate profile from a deep link
description: A candidate or employee can open a shared profile deep link and view the full profile content.

steps.description: Navigate to /candidate/[id] using a valid candidate deep link
Verify the candidate profile page is displayed
Verify the TrustScore, BToken, and EDI panels are displayed

title: Request mentoring from an available mentor
description: A user can request mentoring from an available mentor and see the confirmation and token balance update in the workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Networking entry point
Select the mentors filter
Open a mentor with available capacity
Request mentoring
Verify a mentoring confirmation is visible
Verify the B-Tokens balance is updated

title: Ignore an invalid demo code and stay on home
description: This test verifies that a visitor opening an invalid demo deep link stays on the home experience and does not load a project.

steps.description: Navigate to /?demo=INVALID
Verify the home experience is displayed
Verify no project results are loaded

title: Compare selected candidates and open constellation
description: This verifies a user can select multiple candidates, review the comparison grid, and jump into the team constellation view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project results view
Select two candidates for comparison
Open the comparison view
Verify the side-by-side comparison grid and shared skills are visible
Open the constellation view
Verify the team constellation view is displayed

title: Return to restored networking state after visiting a profile
description: This test verifies that an employee can open a profile from networking and then return to the same networking state after navigating back.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open networking
Open a profile from networking
Click back
Verify the networking view is restored
Verify the prior networking filters or results are preserved

title: Refine the team with a Spanish command and reset filters
description: A manager can refine a recommended team with a valid Spanish command, remove an applied filter, and restore the original result by resetting all filters.
category: Project Results and Team Recommendation Review

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the demo project result from the home experience
Open the refinement drawer
Enter a valid Spanish refinement command that requests Kafka skills
Verify a filter chip is displayed
Verify the team metrics update
Remove one applied filter chip
Reset all filters
Verify the original team result is restored

title: Request mentoring from a capacity-aware mentor
description: This test verifies that an employee can request mentoring from a mentor with available capacity and see the request state update.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open networking
Request mentoring from an available mentor
Verify the mentoring request state is displayed
Verify mentor capacity information remains visible

title: Browse networking profiles by role
description: A user can open Networking and switch between all profiles, mentors, peers, and mentees to see the list update.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Networking entry point
Select the mentors filter
Select the peers filter
Select the mentees filter
Verify the networking profile list is displayed for the selected filters

title: Open candidate audit from project results
description: This verifies a manager can review a candidate's match explanation from project results and then reach the candidate's full profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project results view
Open a candidate audit modal
Verify the score summary and factor breakdown are visible
Open the full profile link
Verify the candidate profile page is displayed

title: Review an employee profile from a deep link
description: This test verifies that a visitor can open a candidate profile directly and see the full profile, TrustScore, BToken, and EDI panels.

steps.description: Navigate to /candidate/1
Verify the employee profile is displayed
Verify the TrustScore, BToken, and EDI panels are displayed

title: Compare selected candidates side by side
description: A manager can select multiple candidates and see the comparison experience update as selections change.
category: Project Results and Team Recommendation Review

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the demo project result from the home experience
Select at least two candidates from the recommended team
Verify the comparison bar is displayed
Deselect one of the selected candidates
Verify the comparison bar updates to reflect the remaining selection

title: Refine a recommended team with Spanish input
description: This test verifies that a manager can use Spanish conversational refinement on a recommended team and see the team recommendations update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Launch the demo SDA project
Refine the recommended team using a Spanish availability and skill request
Verify the recommended team updates
Verify the coverage summary remains visible

title: Search networking profiles by name or skill
description: A user can search within Networking and see the results narrow to matching profiles.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Networking entry point
Type a valid search term into the networking search field
Verify matching networking profiles are displayed

title: Review workforce intelligence overview
description: This test verifies that a visitor can open the dashboard and see the headline insight, KPI summary, and workforce-type breakdown.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the AI headline insight is displayed
Verify the KPI cards are displayed
Verify the workforce-type summary is displayed

title: Compare candidates from project results
description: This test verifies that a manager can select multiple candidates from project results and open the side-by-side comparison view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Launch the demo SDA project
Select two candidates for comparison
Verify the comparison view is displayed
Verify both selected candidates are shown

title: Inspect a gap recommendation in the team view
description: A manager can expand a gap card and review the severity and recommendation for a missing skill or role.
category: Project Results and Team Recommendation Review

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the demo project result from the home experience
Expand a gap card in the team workspace
Verify the gap details are displayed
Verify the recommendation for addressing the gap is displayed

title: Open team constellation from comparison
description: This verifies a user can move from candidate comparison into the shared team constellation view and inspect a member focus change.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a project results view
Select two candidates for comparison
Open the comparison view
Open the constellation view
Select a member from the sidebar
Verify the graph focus updates to the selected member

title: Connect with a peer and open their profile
description: A user can connect with a peer from Networking and then open that person's profile view to continue exploring them.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Networking entry point
Select the peers filter
Connect with a peer
Open that person's profile view
Verify the candidate profile is displayed

title: Open candidate audit and jump to a profile
description: This test verifies that a manager can open the Why Candidate audit modal from project results and continue into the candidate's profile view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Launch the demo SDA project
Open the candidate audit view
Open the candidate profile from the audit
Verify the candidate profile is displayed
Verify the profile's explanation panels are displayed

title: Use a suggestion chip to search for talent
description: An employee can pick a suggested query chip, submit it, and review the ranked talent results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the search input
Select a suggestion chip to fill the query
Submit the search
Verify ranked candidate results are displayed

title: Review workforce intelligence dashboard insights
description: This verifies a stakeholder can open the workforce intelligence dashboard and see its core KPI, chart, and risk insight sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the dashboard headline insight is displayed
Verify the KPI cards and charts are visible

title: Open a collaborator profile from a candidate page
description: This test verifies that a visitor can follow a collaborator link from one employee profile to another and see the second profile load.

steps.description: Navigate to /candidate/1
Click a collaborator link
Verify the linked employee profile is displayed

title: Review a candidate audit and open the full profile
description: A manager can inspect the explainable audit for a recommended candidate and then open that candidate’s full profile.
category: Project Results and Team Recommendation Review

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the demo project result from the home experience
Open the audit details for a candidate
Verify the candidate audit modal is displayed
Verify the score breakdown is displayed
Open the candidate’s full profile from the audit view
Verify the candidate profile page is displayed

title: Open workforce intelligence dashboard
description: A stakeholder can open the dashboard and review the main workforce intelligence summary and supporting charts.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the workforce intelligence summary is displayed
Verify dashboard KPI and chart content is displayed

title: Open networking from home and review people discovery
description: This test verifies that an employee can enter the networking experience from home and see mentor and peer discovery results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open networking
Verify the mentor and peer discovery results are displayed
Verify the B-Token and capacity information is visible

title: Export the team summary and deep link
description: A manager can open the export menu and access the print, summary copy, and deep-link actions for the current recommendation.
category: Project Results and Team Recommendation Review

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the demo project result from the home experience
Open the export menu
Verify export actions are displayed
Choose to print the page
Verify the print dialog is invoked

title: Restore networking after returning from a profile
description: A user can leave Networking for a profile and return with the browser back button to the same networking state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Networking entry point
Type a valid search term into the networking search field
Open a profile from the networking results
Press the browser back button
Verify the networking view is restored
Verify the prior networking filters or search state is restored

title: Expand a workforce risk card
description: This test verifies that a visitor can expand a silo risk card and review the detailed factors and suggestions for that risk.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Expand a silo risk card
Verify the risk details are displayed
Verify the AI suggestion content is displayed

title: Open a candidate profile and follow collaborator links
description: An employee can open an individual profile from search results and traverse collaborator links between profiles.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the search input
Type a query with at least three characters into the search field
Submit the search
Open a candidate profile from the ranked results
Click a collaborator link from the profile
Verify the collaborator profile page is displayed

title: Open a candidate profile directly
description: This verifies a candidate deep link opens an individual profile with the expected insight panels and collaborator links.

steps.description: Navigate to a valid candidate profile route
Verify the candidate hero section is displayed
Verify the TrustScore, BToken, and EDI panels are visible

title: Filter networking results by role or skill
description: This test verifies that an employee can refine networking results with filters and see the displayed mentors or peers change.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open networking
Apply a networking filter
Verify the networking results update
Verify the filtered capacity information remains visible

title: Switch theme on the dashboard and keep it after refresh
description: A stakeholder can change the theme on the dashboard and see that choice persist after reloading the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Switch to a different theme
Refresh the page
Verify the selected theme is still applied

title: Review workforce charts and distributions
description: This test verifies that a visitor can inspect the dashboard's demand-supply, availability, and seniority visualizations.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the demand-supply chart is displayed
Verify the availability chart is displayed
Verify the seniority chart is displayed

title: Review collaborator connections on a candidate profile
description: A viewer can inspect a profile’s collaborators and move to a connected person’s profile from the same page.

steps.description: Navigate to /candidate/[id] using a valid candidate deep link
Open a collaborator link from the profile
Verify the connected collaborator profile is displayed

title: Review whitepaper architecture and compliance
description: This test verifies that a visitor can open the whitepaper from home, review the architecture layers and component statuses, and reach the compliance section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the whitepaper
Scroll through the page
Verify the architecture layers are displayed
Verify the compliance section is displayed

title: Reopen the onboarding tour from home
description: This verifies the user can open the guided tour again from the home page after dismissing it.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the onboarding tour from the home page
Review the guided steps again
Close the onboarding tour
Verify the onboarding tour is closed
Verify the home entry screen is visible

title: Prevent submitting too-short search queries
description: An employee cannot submit a candidate search until the query is long enough to be valid.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the search input
Type fewer than three characters into the search field
Verify search submission remains disabled

title: Traverse collaborator links between profiles
description: This verifies a user can move from one candidate profile to another through collaborator links without leaving the profile experience.

steps.description: Navigate to a valid candidate profile route
Open a collaborator link
Verify another candidate profile page is displayed
Verify the collaborator network section is visible
